purpose: L4 constraint: operator composition and process cycles. Legos must survive iterated CPTP cycling.

L4_constraints.composition: Operators must COMPOSE in specific orders (N01). Not all legos are composable.
L4_constraints.order_dependence: A.B != B.A for nontrivial processes. Commutativity = no process arrow.
L4_constraints.cycling: 4-operator cycle (Z-deph, Z-rot, X-deph, X-rot) x 10 rounds. Legos that converge to trivial (max entropy, zero correlation) are KILLED.
L4_constraints.fixed_point: The cycle's fixed point is maximally mixed. Legos that can't distinguish mm from anything else are useless.

cycle_definition.rationale: Dephasing in two bases + rotation in two bases = full Bloch sphere coverage. No basis is privileged. This is the MINIMAL cycle that respects N01 (order matters) and covers all orientations.

test_2_order_dependence.N01_interpretation: Channels that commute with ALL others lack composition order. N01 says order matters. These are SUSPICIOUS but not automatically killed -- they might commute with the cycle operators but not with future operators.

test_3_fixed_point.conclusion: ALL initial states converge to maximally mixed under the cycle.

concurrence.kill_reason: Correlation -> 0 under cycle: decoherence kills it

negativity.kill_reason: Correlation -> 0 under cycle: decoherence kills it

entanglement_of_formation.kill_reason: Correlation -> 0 under cycle: decoherence kills it

theorem_1_bloch_contraction.statement: After 10 rounds of (Z-deph, Z-rot, X-deph, X-rot) with p=0.3, Bloch length^2 <= (1-p)^(2N) <= 7.98e-4 for ANY initial state.
theorem_1_bloch_contraction.interpretation: PROVED: cycling MUST shrink Bloch vector to near-zero. All 1-qubit measures that depend on Bloch length are KILLED.

theorem_1_analytic_verification.conclusion: Bloch vector magnitude <= 0.028 after 10 rounds. ALL Bloch-dependent measures lose >97% discrimination. KILLED.

theorem_2_entanglement_death.statement: Concurrence and negativity MUST reach ~0 under 10 rounds of bilateral local dephasing.
theorem_2_entanglement_death.z3_query: Can off-diagonal magnitude > 0.001 after 10 bilateral dephasing rounds?
theorem_2_entanglement_death.interpretation: PROVED: entanglement measures (concurrence, negativity, EoF) are KILLED by cycling.

theorem_2_analytic_verification.conclusion: Off-diagonal elements contract by 0.49^10 ~ 7.4e-4. Concurrence, negativity, EoF -> 0. KILLED.

theorem_3_purity_death.statement: After 10 rounds, purity <= (1 + 0.7^20)/2 = 0.5004. ANY lego requiring purity > 0.5 is KILLED.
kills: fubini_study (requires pure states for meaningful value)
monopole_curvature (requires pure state on Bloch sphere)
theorem_3_purity_death.conclusion: Pure-state-only legos are KILLED: cycling produces mixed states. Purity converges to 0.5 (maximally mixed).
